scope: wave2 fan-out gap-close: all 5 legacy-parity read streams are now migrated. contacts/lists/fields are brand-scoped substreams read via the engine's fan_out dialect (S4 engine mini-wave item 2), which lists every brand id (GET /brands, base cursor pagination) then repeats the per-brand paginated read once per brand id, stamping brand_id onto every record — closing the ENGINE_GAP that previously blocked these three streams
